name: LINE CLOVA
description: LINE/Navers AI platform — Japanese speech, OCR and HyperCLOVA LLM APIs integrated with the LINE ecosystem.

seo.title: LINE CLOVA — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: LINE CLOVA: LINE/Navers AI platform — Japanese speech, OCR and HyperCLOVA LLM APIs integrated with the LINE ecosystem.

when_to_use: Integrating AI features into LINE messaging platform apps
Building Japanese AI chatbots powered by LINE's LLM services
Accessing LINE's AI API for Japanese consumer-facing applications
Deploying AI-powered services to LINE's large Japanese user base

pros: Deep integration with LINE messaging ecosystem
Strong Japanese ASR, OCR, and TTS quality
HyperCLOVA LLM tuned for Japanese nuance
cons: Limited relevance outside Japan and Korea
review.verdict: The go-to AI stack when LINE is your distribution channel in Japan or Korea.
review.best_for: Apps and bots distributed primarily via LINE in JP/KR markets
review.not_for: Products outside the LINE ecosystem or needing English-first docs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
